text: Once upon a time, there was a mouse who loved spaghetti. Every night after dinner, he'd nibble on spaghetti strands stuck to his teeth. One evening, he accidentally rolled off a branch into a puddle. Floaty! Swimming steadily, he reached an island of marshmallows. They welcomed him with sticks of chocolate. The mouse grinned. For days, he enjoyed campfires and sweet treats. But when the weather grew cold, he missed his home. So he flew back. Just then, a hunter's shotgun came blasting. Down went the mouse! But next spring, he found another island. This time, he shared his wisdom. Harvested wisely, everyone enjoyed.
